news.t: Themes ETFs Launch with Expense Ratios 40% Below the Category Average

holdings.infoBox: SPAM is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fortinet stock at 6.23%, CrowdStrike Holdings at 6.03%, Okta, Inc. at 6.01%, Palo Alto Networks at 5.80%, and Nebius Group at 5.65%.

overview.description: The Themes Cybersecurity ETF (SPAM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive Cyber Security index. The fund seeks to track a concentrated index of stocks from developed markets that derive their revenues from digital security software. Stocks are weighted based on market capitalization. SPAM was launched on Dec 8, 2023 and is issued by Themes.

data.title: 2026 will be the year cybersecurity meets AI, says Wedbush's Dan Ives
data.text: Dan Ives, Wedbush, joins 'Power Lunch' to talk how cybersecurity plays could be the next frontier for AI investing in 2026.

data.title: Themes ETFs Launch with Expense Ratios 40% Below the Category Average
data.text: Priced at 0.35%, over 40% below the average expense ratio charged by other thematic funds, Themes ETFs seeks to provide investors with targeted thematic exposure at low costs.1 NEW YORK , Dec. 8, 2023...
